title: MUSE-DARK-II: 3D morpho-kinematic modelling of lensed galaxies. Tully-Fisher relation of $z \sim 1$ star-forming galaxies
comment: 21 pages, 12 figures, 4 tables. Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: In a series of papers on lensed kinematics, we seek to combine the sensitivity of 3D forward modelling to low signal-to-noise ratio outskirts with the enhanced spatial resolution of cluster lensing. In this first paper, we (i) present and validate our methodology, which directly constrains the source parameters by incorporating lensing deflections into the $\texttt{GalPaK}^\texttt{3D}$ forward-modelling algorithm, and (ii) investigate the evolution of the stellar-mass and baryonic-mass Tully-Fisher relations (sTFR and bTFR) since $z \sim 1$. We define a robust sample of strongly lensed star-forming galaxies (SFGs) from the MUSE Lensing Cluster survey, spanning magnifications $μ= 1.4 - 12.4$ and stellar masses $M_\star = 10^{8.1} - 10^{10.3} M_\odot$. Using a series of mock galaxies, we find that our method is significantly more reliable at recovering morpho-kinematic properties than approaches that ignore differential magnification, even for relatively modest magnifications ($μ< 6$). Restricting the analysis to 95 rotationally supported SFGs with well-constrained velocities, we find a significant evolution of the sTFR zero-point ($Δb^\mathrm{sTFR} = -0.42^{+0.05}_{-0.05}~\mathrm{dex}$ in stellar mass) but no detectable evolution of the bTFR zero-point ($Δb^\mathrm{bTFR} = 0.00^{+0.06}_{-0.06}~\mathrm{dex}$ in baryonic mass) relative to $z \approx 0$. Our results are consistent with a mild evolution of the stellar-to-halo mass ratio and support the view that the sTFR has evolved only weakly over the past $\sim 8$ Gyr, aside from shifts driven by the redshift dependence of halo-defining quantities such as the critical density and overdensity. The absence of detectable evolution in the bTFR zero-point suggests that the increasing contribution of cold gas mass at higher redshift fully compensates the evolution observed in the stellar component alone. [abridged]

AI.tldr: 该研究结合引力透镜增强的空间分辨率和3D前向建模对低信噪比外围区域的敏感性，开发了一种新方法，并研究了z~1以来恒星质量和重子质量Tully-Fisher关系的演化。
AI.motivation: 结合引力透镜的高空间分辨率和3D前向建模对低信噪比外围区域的敏感性，以更可靠地约束星系形态运动学特性，并研究星系演化中的质量-速度关系变化。
AI.method: 开发了将透镜偏折直接整合到GalPaK^3D前向建模算法中的方法，从MUSE透镜星系团巡天中选取强透镜恒星形成星系样本，通过模拟验证方法可靠性，分析旋转支撑星系的Tully-Fisher关系演化。
AI.result: 新方法在恢复形态运动学特性方面比忽略微分放大的方法更可靠；发现恒星质量TFR零点显著演化（Δb^sTFR = -0.42 dex），而重子质量TFR零点无显著演化（Δb^bTFR = 0.00 dex）。
AI.conclusion: 恒星质量TFR的演化较弱，主要由晕定义量的红移依赖性驱动；重子质量TFR零点无演化表明高红移冷气体质量的增加完全补偿了恒星组分的演化，支持恒星-晕质量比的温和演化。

Förster Schreiber、Reinhard Genzel等核心作者所在领域高度重叠。论文创新性在于方法学改进（处理微分放大）和TFR演化约束，与用户对高红移星系动力学的研究兴趣一致。无负面理由。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在一系列关于透镜运动学的论文中，我们试图将三维正演模型对低信噪比外围区域的敏感性与星系团透镜增强的空间分辨率相结合。在这第一篇论文中，我们(i) 提出并验证了我们的方法，该方法通过将透镜偏折纳入 $\texttt{GalPaK}^\texttt{3D}$ 正演建模算法来直接约束源参数，并(ii) 研究了自 $z \sim 1$ 以来恒星质量和重子质量 Tully-Fisher 关系（sTFR 和 bTFR）的演化。我们从 MUSE 透镜星系团巡天中定义了一个稳健的强透镜恒星形成星系样本，其放大率 $μ= 1.4 - 12.4$，恒星质量 $M_\star = 10^{8.1} - 10^{10.3} M_\odot$。通过一系列模拟星系，我们发现，即使对于相对适中的放大率（$μ< 6$），我们的方法在恢复形态运动学特性方面也显著优于忽略微分放大率的方法。将分析限制在 95 个具有良好约束速度的旋转支持恒星形成星系上，我们发现 sTFR 零点存在显著演化（恒星质量 $Δb^\mathrm{sTFR} = -0.42^{+0.05}_{-0.05}~\mathrm{dex}$），但相对于 $z \approx 0$，bTFR 零点没有可探测的演化（重子质量 $Δb^\mathrm{bTFR} = 0.00^{+0.06}_{-0.06}~\mathrm{dex}$）。我们的结果与恒星-晕质量比的温和演化一致，并支持 sTFR 在过去 $\sim 8$ Gyr 中仅发生微弱演化的观点，除了由晕定义量（如临界密度和过密度）的红移依赖性驱动的偏移。bTFR 零点缺乏可探测的演化表明，高红移时冷气体质量贡献的增加完全补偿了仅恒星成分中观测到的演化。[已删节]
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：恒星质量TFR的演化较弱，主要由晕定义量的红移依赖性驱动；重子质量TFR零点无演化表明高红移冷气体质量的增加完全补偿了恒星组分的演化，支持恒星-晕质量比的温和演化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Schematic view of the lensing configuration and coordinate frames. The observed image-frame coordinates \(\mathbf{r}^{{img}}-\mathbf{r}_{0}^{{img}}\) are mapped to source-frame coordinates \(\mathbf{r}^{{src}}-\mathbf{r}_{0}^{{src}}\) via the lens equation \(\mathbf{r}^{{src}}=\mathbf{r}^{{img}}-\bm{\alpha}(\mathbf{r}^{{img}})\) . The source-frame coordinates correspond to positions \(\mathbf{r}\) in the physical galaxy frame, where parametric flux and velocity profiles are defined. These coordinate transformations do not alter the model grid, which remains aligned and regularly sampled along the IFS spatial axes and the LOS. This schematic is inspired by Bartelmann and Schneider ( 2001 ) and Di Teodoro and Fraternali ( 2015 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：透镜构型和坐标系的示意图。观测图像帧坐标 \(\mathbf{r}^{{img}}-\mathbf{r}_{0}^{{img}}\) 通过透镜方程 \(\mathbf{r}^{{src}}=\mathbf{r}^{{img}}-\bm{\alpha}(\mathbf{r}^{{img}})\) 映射到源帧坐标 \(\mathbf{r}^{{src}}-\mathbf{r}_{0}^{{src}}\)。源帧坐标对应于物理星系帧中的位置 \(\mathbf{r}\)，其中定义了参数化的通量和速度轮廓。这些坐标变换不会改变模型网格，该网格沿IFS空间轴和视线方向保持对齐并规则采样。此示意图受Bartelmann and Schneider (2001) 以及 Di Teodoro and Fraternali (2015) 启发。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Main parameters of our kinematic model, together with their adopted priors or fixed values. 4 4 4 Other parameters (position, flux and PA) are assigned broad uniform priors, following the default settings in GalPaK \({}^{\texttt{3D}}\) . A truncated Gaussian prior is denoted as \(\mathcal{N}_{{tr}}(x,y,z)\) , with centre \(x\) , parent standard deviation \(y\) , and truncation bounds \(z\) . A uniform prior over the interval \(\left[x,y\right]\) is written as \(\mathcal{U}\left[x,y\right]\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：我们运动学模型的主要参数，以及采用的先验或固定值。4 4 4 其他参数（位置、通量和PA）被赋予宽均匀先验，遵循GalPaK \({}^{\texttt{3D}}\) 的默认设置。截断高斯先验记为 \(\mathcal{N}_{{tr}}(x,y,z)\)，中心为 \(x\)，母标准差为 \(y\)，截断边界为 \(z\)。区间 \(\left[x,y\right]\) 上的均匀先验记为 \(\mathcal{U}\left[x,y\right]\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Comparison of the relative errors in the inferred properties, defined as \(\delta p/p=(p^{{fit}}-p^{{true}})/p^{{true}}\) , for a kinematic model fitted either directly in the image frame (left column) or in the source frame using the GalPaK \({}^{\texttt{3D}}\) Strong Lensing Extension (right column). Each row shows the error density distribution for a given property, restricted to the rotation-dominated subsample of mock galaxies ( \(v_{1.8}/\sigma_{0}>1\) ). The effective radius is corrected a posteriori by the magnification when fitted in the image plane. The PA error is relative to \({PA}^{{true}}=\qty{130}{}\) , as in Bouché et al. ( 2015b ) . Dashed lines show the empirical relation \(\delta p/p=\pm S/N_{{max}}\times(\sqrt{\mu}R_{e}/R_{{PSF}})^{\alpha}\) based on the coefficients \(\alpha\) from Bouché et al. ( 2015b ) , while solid vertical lines indicate \(S/N_{{max}}\times(\sqrt{\mu}R_{e}/R_{{PSF}})^{\alpha}=10\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：推断属性相对误差的比较，定义为 \(\delta p/p=(p^{{fit}}-p^{{true}})/p^{{true}}\)，分别针对在图像帧中直接拟合（左列）或使用GalPaK \({}^{\texttt{3D}}\) 强透镜扩展在源帧中拟合（右列）的运动学模型。每行显示给定属性的误差密度分布，仅限于旋转主导的模拟星系子样本（ \(v_{1.8}/\sigma_{0}>1\) ）。在图像平面中拟合时，有效半径通过放大率进行事后校正。PA误差相对于 \({PA}^{{true}}=\qty{130}{}\)，如Bouché et al. (2015b) 所述。虚线显示了基于Bouché et al. (2015b) 系数 \(\alpha\) 的经验关系 \(\delta p/p=\pm S/N_{{max}}\times(\sqrt{\mu}R_{e}/R_{{PSF}})^{\alpha}\)，而实垂直线表示 \(S/N_{{max}}\times(\sqrt{\mu}R_{e}/R_{{PSF}})^{\alpha}=10\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Same as Fig. 2 , additionally restricted to the subsample of mock galaxies satisfying \(\mu>3\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：与图2相同，但额外限制于满足 \(\mu>3\) 的模拟星系子样本。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : S/N of the brightest [O ii ] spaxel against the apparent size-to-PSF ratio. The hatched grey region marks the parameter space excluded by our selection. Red symbols mark 6 galaxies chosen to showcase the range of apparent sizes and S/N in Fig. 6 . Open symbols mark galaxies that are either dispersion-dominated ( \(v_{1.8}/\sigma_{0}\leq 1\) ) or have poorly constrained velocities ( \(\Delta v_{1.8}/v_{1.8}\geq 30\%\) ), where \(\Delta v_{1.8}\) is the posterior standard deviation. The background hexagonal bins illustrate the fraction of rotation-dominated ( \(v_{1.8}/\sigma_{0}>1\) ) mock galaxies with a robust velocity recovery ( \(|v^{{fit}}_{1.8}-v^{{true}}_{1.8}|/v^{{true}}_{1.8}
figures.caption_zh: 图4：最亮 [O ii ] 空间像素的信噪比与表观尺寸-PSF比的关系。灰色阴影区域标记了被我们选择排除的参数空间。红色符号标记了6个星系，用于展示图6中表观尺寸和信噪比的范围。空心符号标记了要么是色散主导（ \(v_{1.8}/\sigma_{0}\leq 1\) ）要么速度约束较差（ \(\Delta v_{1.8}/v_{1.8}\geq 30\%\) ）的星系，其中 \(\Delta v_{1.8}\) 是后验标准差。背景六边形箱体显示了旋转主导（ \(v_{1.8}/\sigma_{0}>1\) ）且速度恢复稳健（ \(|v^{{fit}}_{1.8}-v^{{true}}_{1.8}|/v^{{true}}_{1.8}\) ）的模拟星系比例。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : General sample properties. The panels show the distributions of redshift (top left) and magnification (bottom left), together with the locations of the galaxies in the \(M_{\star}\) –SFR (middle) and \(M_{\star}\) – \(R_{e}\) (right) planes. Effective radii are corrected to rest-frame 5000 Å following Eqs. 1 and 2 of van der Wel et al. ( 2014 ) , expressed relative to the size–mass relation of Nedkova et al. ( 2021 ) (interpolated with redshift), and scaled to \(z=1\) . Similarly, SFRs are expressed relative to the star-forming main sequence of Boogaard et al. ( 2018 ) , adjusted to the redshift and stellar mass of each galaxy, and normalized to \(z=1\) . The shaded regions indicate the \(\pm 1\sigma\) (dark grey) and \(\pm 2\sigma\) (light grey) scatter around the corresponding relations. Open symbols and histogram segments mark galaxies that are either dispersion-dominated ( \(v_{1.8}/\sigma_{0}\leq 1\) ) or have poorly constrained velocities ( \(\Delta v_{1.8}/v_{1.8}\geq 30\%\) ), where \(\Delta v_{1.8}\) is the posterior standard deviation.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：样本总体属性。面板显示了红移（左上）和放大率（左下）的分布，以及星系在 \(M_{\star}\) –SFR（中）和 \(M_{\star}\) – \(R_{e}\)（右）平面中的位置。有效半径根据van der Wel et al. (2014) 的公式1和2校正到静止系5000 Å，表示为相对于Nedkova et al. (2021) 的尺寸-质量关系（按红移插值），并缩放到 \(z=1\)。类似地，SFR表示为相对于Boogaard et al. (2018) 的恒星形成主序，根据每个星系的红移和恒星质量进行调整，并归一化到 \(z=1\)。阴影区域表示相应关系周围的 \(\pm 1\sigma\)（深灰色）和 \(\pm 2\sigma\)（浅灰色）弥散。空心符号和直方图段标记了要么是色散主导（ \(v_{1.8}/\sigma_{0}\leq 1\) ）要么速度约束较差（ \(\Delta v_{1.8}/v_{1.8}\geq 30\%\) ）的星系，其中 \(\Delta v_{1.8}\) 是后验标准差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : For each galaxy highlighted in Fig. 4 , we present the reconstructed HST/F160W source-plane image, the corresponding observed HST/F160W image, the MUSE [O ii ] pseudo-narrowband, the LOS velocity map and best-fitting GalPaK \({}^{\texttt{3D}}\) model, as well as P-V diagrams extracted from both the observed and model datacubes. The MUSE PSF FWHM is indicated by the hatched circle. The sequence of grey rectangles marks the 1 arcsec-wide slit used to extract the P-V diagrams.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：对于图4中高亮的每个星系，我们展示了重建的HST/F160W源平面图像、对应的观测HST/F160W图像、MUSE [O ii ] 伪窄带、视线方向速度图和最佳拟合的GalPaK \({}^{\texttt{3D}}\) 模型，以及从观测和模型数据立方体中提取的P-V图。MUSE PSF半高全宽由阴影圆表示。灰色矩形序列标记了用于提取P-V图的1角秒宽狭缝。

title: Seeding grain nucleation and dust growth: Ionisation, epoxidation and charge disproportionation effects
summary: This work studies the likely dust seeding processes arising from alkali metal and alkaline earth ionisation, epoxidation (epoxide bond formation via oxygen atom insertion into C=C bonds), and grain charge disproportionation (the existence around the uncharged state of oxidised cationic and reduced anionic states) at (sub-)nanometre size scales. The chemical, physical, and photon-initiated processes leading to dust seeding are explored within the framework of the size-dependent physical, optical, and photoelectric properties of the THEMIS carbonaceous nanoparticles. The critical grain charge states at (sub-)nanometre size scales are derived as a function of the interstellar and circumstellar physical conditions. Photo-initiated low-energy ionisation, epoxide reactions, and disproportionation-driven electrostatic effects could play key roles in seeding dust nucleation and growth. The size-dependent seed cluster and nanograin charge distribution is shown to encompass both positive and negative charges where the ionisation is driven by low ionisation metals or by weak attenuation. Cluster seeding via ionisation and epoxidation could help to explain the co-spatial and contemporaneous nucleation and growth of both carbon-rich and oxygen-rich dust in the same regions. This may be enhanced by electrostatic effects, driven by charge disproportionation, between negatively-charged, nucleation-seeding, polyatomic clusters and positively-charged ions or larger (nano)particles. Such processes could occur in the dust-forming regions in novae, Wolf-Rayet, and Luminous Blue Variable systems and electrostatic effects may also aid the accretion of nanoparticles in the outer regions of molecular clouds.

AI.tldr: 研究亚纳米尺度下碱金属和碱土金属电离、环氧化反应以及晶粒电荷歧化对尘埃成核过程的影响，探讨这些过程在星际和星周环境中的尘埃形成机制。
AI.motivation: 探索星际和星周环境中尘埃成核的微观物理化学机制，特别是亚纳米尺度下电荷状态对尘埃种子形成的影响，以解释碳富集和氧富集尘埃在相同区域同时成核生长的现象。
AI.method: 基于THEMIS碳质纳米颗粒的尺寸依赖性物理、光学和光电特性，研究化学、物理和光子引发的尘埃成核过程，推导亚纳米尺度下关键晶粒电荷状态与星际/星周物理条件的关系。
AI.result: 发现光引发的低能电离、环氧化反应和歧化驱动的静电效应在尘埃成核和生长中起关键作用；种子团簇和纳米晶粒的电荷分布包含正负电荷，电离由低电离金属或弱衰减驱动。
AI.conclusion: 电离和环氧化驱动的团簇成核可以解释碳富集和氧富集尘埃在相同区域的共时空成核生长，静电效应可能增强这一过程；这些机制可能发生在新星、沃尔夫-拉叶星、亮蓝变星的尘埃形成区，并有助于分子云外区的纳米颗粒吸积。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为星际尘埃成核的微观物理化学机制，与用户画像中的'dust'和'molecular'关键词部分匹配，但用户核心兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学和气体性质，该论文完全不涉及引力透镜、高红移星系或星系动力学，且无核心作者重叠。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低度匹配。仅与'dust'和'molecular'两个泛关键词相关，未涉及用户核心的强引力透镜、高红移星系、暗物质等主题。
recommendation.method_fit: 不匹配。论文采用理论化学模型研究纳米颗粒电荷状态，与用户常用的引力透镜建模、IFU光谱分析等方法无关。
recommendation.author_fit: 无匹配。作者A. P. Jones不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等。论文提出电离、环氧化和电荷歧化在尘埃成核中的新机制，但属于星际介质化学领域，与用户主要研究方向差异大。
recommendation.negative_reason: 完全不涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、星系气体性质等用户核心兴趣领域，且无核心作者参与。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了在（亚）纳米尺度上，由碱金属和碱土金属电离、环氧化（通过氧原子插入C=C键形成环氧键）以及晶粒电荷歧化（围绕未荷电状态存在氧化阳离子态和还原阴离子态）可能引发的尘埃成核过程。在THEMIS碳质纳米颗粒的尺寸依赖性物理、光学和光电性质框架内，研究了导致尘埃成核的化学、物理和光子引发过程。推导了（亚）纳米尺度下临界晶粒电荷态与星际和星周物理条件的关系。光引发的低能电离、环氧化物反应以及歧化驱动的静电效应可能在尘埃成核和生长中发挥关键作用。尺寸依赖的成核团簇和纳米颗粒电荷分布显示同时包含正电荷和负电荷，其中电离由低电离金属或弱衰减驱动。通过电离和环氧化实现的团簇成核有助于解释同一区域中碳富集和氧富集尘埃的共空间和同时成核生长。这可能是由电荷歧化驱动的静电效应增强的，发生在带负电的成核多原子团簇与带正电的离子或更大（纳米）颗粒之间。此类过程可能发生在新星、沃尔夫-拉叶星和亮蓝变星系统的尘埃形成区，静电效应也可能有助于分子云外部区域纳米颗粒的吸积。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：电离和环氧化驱动的团簇成核可以解释碳富集和氧富集尘埃在相同区域的共时空成核生长，静电效应可能增强这一过程；这些机制可能发生在新星、沃尔夫-拉叶星、亮蓝变星的尘埃形成区，并有助于分子云外区的纳米颗粒吸积。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Size-dependent nanoparticle IP (red line, Eq. 12 ), EA (blue line, Eq. 13 ), work function ( \(W\) , cobalt line, Eq. 14 ) and band gap ( \(E_{g}\) , black line, Eq. 8 ). The atomic IPs and the carbon atom EA (dashed and dotted horizontal lines) are also shown. All quantities are in eV.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：尺寸依赖的纳米颗粒IP（红线，式12）、EA（蓝线，式13）、功函数（\(W\)，钴色线，式14）和带隙（\(E_{g}\)，黑线，式8）。还显示了原子IP和碳原子EA（虚线和点状水平线）。所有量均以eV为单位。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Photon energies and fluxes, gas densities and temperatures taken to be typical of novæ, WR stars etc. The colours indicated in the column headers refer to Fig. 2 . The CNM cloud disproportionation radii are \(\simeq 1.2\) , 1.5, 2.2, 7, 200, and 700nm for \(A_{V}=\) 0, 0.25, 0.5, 1, and 2, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：取典型新星、WR星等的光子能量和通量、气体密度和温度。列标题中指示的颜色参考图2。CNM云歧化半径对于\(A_{V}=\) 0、0.25、0.5、1和2分别约为\(\simeq 1.2\)、1.5、2.2、7、200和700nm。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Collision enhancement factors, \(F_{C}\) for the charge states shown in Fig. 2 ), for the physical conditions in Table 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：对于图2中所示电荷态的碰撞增强因子\(F_{C}\)，对应表1中的物理条件。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Equilibrium charge states for particles as a function of radius, for the parameter sets indicated in Table 1 (purple to blue to cobalt). The squares indicate the derived carbon dust radii, \(\sim 1\) and \(30-50\) nm in WR 140 ( 2023ApJ...951...89L ) and the small diamond marks a seed cluster of radius = 0.3nm. The vertical dashed lines indicate the minimum grain radius and the approximate peak of the large grain size distribution in THEMIS. The red line shows the CNM charge states and the orange lines those for dense cloud edges with \(A_{V}\) of 0, 0.25, 0.5, 1, 2, and 3 (thin to thick orange lines, respectively).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：对于表1中指示的参数集（紫色到蓝色到钴色），颗粒的平衡电荷态随半径的变化。方块表示WR 140中推导的碳尘埃半径，约为\(\sim 1\)和\(30-50\) nm（2023ApJ...951...89L），小菱形标记半径为0.3nm的成核团簇。垂直虚线表示最小晶粒半径和THEMIS中大晶粒尺寸分布的近似峰值。红线显示CNM电荷态，橙线显示具有\(A_{V}\)为0、0.25、0.5、1、2和3的稠密云边缘（分别对应从细到粗的橙线）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Schematic view of seed cluster formation, charge states and evolution (black lines, see Fig. 1 for seed cluster IPs) during dust nucleation in a hardening radiation field (bottom to top). The ionisation stages (K—Na—Li—Ca, Mg—Fe—Si, C, and H—O), neutral-neutral reactions, epoxidation, epoxide ring opening-driven chemistry, cation accretion and electrostatic agglomeration are indicated. For simplicity hydrogen atoms are not indicated.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在硬化辐射场中（从下到上）尘埃成核过程中成核团簇形成、电荷态和演化（黑线，参见图1中成核团簇IP）的示意图。指示了电离阶段（K—Na—Li—Ca、Mg—Fe—Si、C和H—O）、中性-中性反应、环氧化、环氧开环驱动化学、阳离子吸积和静电团聚。为简洁起见，未指示氢原子。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The photon attenuation lengths (dashed lines) for spherical a-C(:H) grains of radii 0.37 (black), 1 (red), 10 (green), and 100 nm (blue). The solid blue line shows the electron mean free path length as a function of energy, which is the same for all grain sizes.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：半径为0.37（黑色）、1（红色）、10（绿色）和100 nm（蓝色）的球形a-C(:H)晶粒的光子衰减长度（虚线）。蓝色实线显示电子平均自由程随能量的变化，对所有晶粒尺寸相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The photoelectric yields (solid lines) for spherical a-C(:H) grains of radii 0.37 (black), 1 (red), 10 (green), and 100 nm (blue). The dashed lines show the photoelectric yields tabulated in ( 2016MNRAS.459.2751K ) for 1, 10, and 100 nm carbon grains.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：半径为0.37（黑色）、1（红色）、10（绿色）和100 nm（蓝色）的球形a-C(:H)晶粒的光电产额（实线）。虚线显示（2016MNRAS.459.2751K）中列出的1、10和100 nm碳晶粒的光电产额。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Coulomb factor as a function of radius for collisions between Ca + ( \(Z=+1\) ) and negatively charged grains ( \(Z=-1\) , black line). The cobalt line gives the electron collision rate with neutral grains ( \(Z=0\) ). Number of collisions per day of Ca + (with anionic particles \(a 2\) nm (purple).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：Ca\(^{+}\)（\(Z=+1\)）与带负电晶粒（\(Z=-1\)，黑线）碰撞的库仑因子随半径的变化。钴色线给出电子与中性晶粒（\(Z=0\)）的碰撞速率。Ca\(^{+}\)每天与阴离子颗粒（\(a 2\) nm，紫色）的碰撞次数。

title: JWST MIRI-MRS observations of the Red Rectangle: AIB class transformation in the outer nebula
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, submitted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: Aims: We characterize the mid-infrared spectrum of the outer regions of the Red Rectangle nebula to probe the carbonaceous dust and molecular content beyond the circumbinary disk. Methods: We present JWST MIRI-MRS observations of the SW whisker, extracted from three distinct environments: the biconical outflow, the whisker itself, and the shadow region outside the outflow. We compare these with an archival ISO-SWS observation of the inner nebula. Results: The JWST spectra display only classical AIB emission on a weak dust continuum, with no signatures of the oxygen-rich circumbinary disk mineralogy nor of the rich molecular emission seen at optical wavelengths. The AIBs are predominantly Class A - in marked contrast to the exclusively Class B profiles previously reported for the inner regions - with systematic differences between the outflow and shadow regions pointing to environmentally driven PAH processing.

AI.tldr: JWST观测揭示红矩形星云外围区域的AIBS光谱特征与内部区域显著不同，显示环境驱动的PAH处理过程
AI.motivation: 研究红矩形星云外围区域的碳质尘埃和分子成分，探究其与中心双星盘区域的差异
AI.method: 使用JWST MIRI-MRS观测SW羽流区域，从三个不同环境（双锥外流、羽流本身、外流外的阴影区）提取光谱，并与ISO-SWS对内部星云的观测进行比较
AI.result: JWST光谱显示仅有经典的AIBS发射和微弱尘埃连续谱，没有富氧双星盘矿物学特征，也没有光学波段观测到的丰富分子发射。AIBS主要为A类，与之前报道的内部区域仅为B类形成鲜明对比，外流和阴影区域之间的系统差异表明环境驱动的PAH处理
AI.conclusion: 红矩形星云外围区域的尘埃和分子成分与内部区域存在显著差异，AIBS特征的变化反映了不同物理化学环境对PAH分子的影响

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为红矩形星云外围的碳质尘埃和PAH分子光谱，属于星际介质和天体化学领域。用户主要兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学和气体性质。虽然论文涉及JWST和尘埃，但科学问题（PAH分类转变）与用户核心方向（高红移星系动力学、引力透镜）无直接关联，且无核心作者匹配。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。用户核心主题为强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等；本文为邻近星云PAH光谱，仅宽泛匹配'尘埃'和'JWST'，但科学目标不相关。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。使用JWST MIRI-MRS光谱分析，但方法针对星际介质化学，而非用户常用的引力透镜建模或高红移星系运动学分析。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文在PAH天体化学领域有新颖性，但与用户兴趣领域无关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文属于星际介质/天体化学，非用户主要兴趣的强引力透镜或高红移星系研究。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 目的：我们表征红矩形星云外围区域的中红外光谱，以探测环双星盘之外的碳质尘埃和分子成分。方法：我们展示了JWST MIRI-MRS对西南“须”的观测，从三个不同环境中提取：双锥外流、须本身以及外流之外的阴影区域。我们将这些观测结果与内星云的档案ISO-SWS观测进行了比较。结果：JWST光谱仅显示在微弱尘埃连续谱上的经典AIB发射，没有富氧环双星盘矿物学特征，也没有在光学波长处看到的丰富分子发射特征。AIB主要为A类——与之前报道的内区域仅有的B类轮廓形成鲜明对比——外流与阴影区域之间的系统差异指向环境驱动的PAH处理。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：红矩形星云外围区域的尘埃和分子成分与内部区域存在显著差异，AIB特征的变化反映了不同物理化学环境对PAH分子的影响。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : JWST-MIRI channel 2C apertures (summed from 10.01 to \(11.7\,\mu\) m) of the positions GO (north), P1P2 (south, mosaic of P1 and P2) and P3 (west) outlined in red on an HST WFPC2 F622W image. White contours represent a diffraction model of the central region at \(10\,\mu\) m, using the MIRI imaging point spread function (PSF).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在HST WFPC2 F622W图像上以红色标出的JWST-MIRI通道2C孔径（从10.01到\(11.7\,\mu\)m求和）的位置GO（北）、P1P2（南，P1和P2的拼接）和P3（西）。白色轮廓表示中心区域在\(10\,\mu\)m处的衍射模型，使用MIRI成像点扩散函数（PSF）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : JWST/MIRI spectra from Regions 1–3 compared with the ISO-SWS spectrum (black). All spectra are continuum-subtracted and normalized to the peak of the 6.2 \(\mu\) m AIB band. Apertures are defined in Fig. 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：区域1–3的JWST/MIRI光谱与ISO-SWS光谱（黑色）的比较。所有光谱均已减去连续谱并归一化到6.2 \(\mu\)m AIB带的峰值。孔径定义见图1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : AIB profile comparison for the 6.2 \(\mu\) m (top); 7.7 \(\mu\) m and 8.6 \(\mu\) m (middle); 11.2 \(\mu\) m (bottom) AIB features. Spectra are normalized to the dominant AIB in each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：6.2 \(\mu\)m（顶部）；7.7 \(\mu\)m和8.6 \(\mu\)m（中部）；11.2 \(\mu\)m（底部）AIB特征的AIB轮廓比较。光谱已归一化到每个面板中的主导AIB。

title: From photometric surveys to HI intensity mapping: Improving constraints on magnification biases while testing gravity
comment: 12 pages, 9 figures, 3 pages of appendices. Article to be submitted to A&A, any comments are welcome
summary: The observed large-scale structure of the Universe is not a direct measure on the underlying distribution of matter. These observations are subtly distorted by gravitational lensing effects, which leave imprints on the statistical distribution of galaxies and offer powerful test of general relativity. In this work, we investigate whether HI intensity mapping from current and forthcoming surveys can improve constraints on magnification lensing obtained from photometric galaxy surveys. In particular, can we jointly constrain the magnification bias parameters $s^\mathrm{G}(z)$ and the amplitude of the Weyl potential, which we parametrise as $β$. We employ a Fisher matrix formalism in order to estimate future constrains on the magnification biases and $β$. We forecast constraints for three photometric surveys (DES-like, LSST-like, Euclid-like) individually and with two HI intensity mapping surveys (MeerKLASS, SKAO). We apply the multi-tracer technique by combining each galaxy survey with each HI survey, exploiting the combined constraining in the overlapping sky area. The multi-tracer approach dramatically improves constraints on $β$ by factors of 25 to 50, depending on the surveys considered. For $s^\mathrm{G}(z)$, improvements can be marginal or by a factors of 2 to 8. We also verify that $β$ and $s^\mathrm{G}(z)$ can be constrained simultaneously as the cross-correlations between tracers break the degeneracies among them. We conclude that the multi-tracer combination of photometric galaxy surveys and HI intensity mapping surveys enables high-precision measurements of both $s^\mathrm{G}(z)$ and $β$. This opens an additional pathway to constrain $Φ+Ψ$ and test the validity of general relativity on cosmological scales.

AI.tldr: 通过结合光测星系巡天和HI强度映射巡天，利用多示踪技术显著改善对引力透镜放大偏置参数和韦尔势振幅的约束，为在宇宙学尺度上测试广义相对论提供新途径。
AI.motivation: 宇宙大尺度结构观测并非直接反映物质分布，而是受到引力透镜效应的微妙扭曲。这些扭曲在星系统计分布中留下印记，为测试广义相对论提供有力工具。研究旨在探索HI强度映射能否改善光测星系巡天对放大透镜效应的约束。
AI.method: 采用Fisher矩阵形式来估计未来对放大偏置参数s^G(z)和韦尔势振幅β的约束。预测了三种光测巡天（DES-like、LSST-like、Euclid-like）单独及与两种HI强度映射巡天（MeerKLASS、SKAO）结合的约束。应用多示踪技术，通过结合星系巡天和HI巡天，利用重叠天区的联合约束能力。
AI.result: 多示踪方法显著改善了对β的约束，改善因子达25-50倍（取决于具体巡天组合）。对s^G(z)的约束改善程度不一，从边际改善到2-8倍改善。验证了β和s^G(z)可以同时约束，因为示踪器间的交叉相关打破了它们之间的简并性。
AI.conclusion: 光测星系巡天与HI强度映射巡天的多示踪组合能够实现对s^G(z)和β的高精度测量，为约束Φ+Ψ和在宇宙学尺度上测试广义相对论的有效性开辟了额外途径。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要研究利用HI强度映射和光测星系巡天的多示踪技术来约束引力透镜放大偏置参数和韦尔势振幅，以测试广义相对论。虽然涉及引力透镜效应，但属于宇宙学尺度的统计约束，而非用户核心关注的星系-星系强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或高红移星系运动学。论文方法为Fisher矩阵预测，不涉及强透镜建模或高红移星系观测。作者列表中无用户核心作者。论文主题偏向宇宙学参数约束和引力检验，与用户主要兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系多相气体、尘埃、致密气体等）匹配度低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为宇宙学尺度上的引力透镜放大效应和引力检验，与用户核心的星系-星系强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学和运动学、高红移多相气体等主题关联较弱。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。采用Fisher矩阵预测未来巡天约束，不涉及强透镜建模、高分辨率光谱或干涉成像等用户常用方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中。多示踪技术结合HI强度映射和光测巡天以改善透镜约束具有一定新颖性，但与用户关注的高红移星系物理前沿关联不大。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文属于宇宙学/引力检验范畴，而非用户核心的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或多相气体研究。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 观测到的大尺度结构并非物质分布的直接测量。这些观测受到引力透镜效应的微妙扭曲，从而在星系的统计分布上留下印记，并为广义相对论提供了强有力的检验。在本工作中，我们研究了当前及未来巡天中的HI强度映射能否改善从测光星系巡天获得的放大透镜约束。具体而言，我们能否联合约束放大偏差参数$s^\mathrm{G}(z)$和Weyl势的振幅（我们将其参数化为$β$）。我们采用Fisher矩阵形式来估计未来对放大偏差和$β$的约束。我们分别对三个测光巡天（类DES、类LSST、类Euclid）以及两个HI强度映射巡天（MeerKLASS、SKAO）进行了预测。通过将每个星系巡天与每个HI巡天相结合，利用重叠天区的联合约束能力，我们应用了多示踪技术。多示踪方法将$β$的约束显著提高了25至50倍，具体取决于所考虑的巡天组合。对于$s^\mathrm{G}(z)$，改进可能是微小的，也可能达到2至8倍。我们还验证了$β$和$s^\mathrm{G}(z)$可以同时得到约束，因为示踪体之间的互相关打破了它们之间的简并。我们得出结论：测光星系巡天与HI强度映射巡天的多示踪组合能够实现对$s^\mathrm{G}(z)$和$β$的高精度测量。这为约束$Φ+Ψ$以及在宇宙学尺度上检验广义相对论的有效性开辟了额外途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：测光星系巡天与HI强度映射巡天的多示踪组合能够实现对$s^\mathrm{G}(z)$和$β$的高精度测量，为约束$Φ+Ψ$和在宇宙学尺度上测试广义相对论的有效性开辟了额外途径。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Non-normalised probability distribution function of photometric galaxies for a DES-like (Fonseca et al. , 2016 ) , a LSST-like (Collaboration et al. , 2021 ) and an Euclid-like (Montanari and Durrer, 2015 ) survey.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：类DES（Fonseca et al., 2016）、类LSST（Collaboration et al., 2021）和类Euclid（Montanari and Durrer, 2015）巡天的测光星系非归一化概率分布函数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Values used for the number density of galaxies, \(n_{{gal}}\) , the galaxy bias, \(b^{G}(z)\) , and the magnification bias, \(s^{G}(z)\) of the three galaxy surveys considered. Markers indicate measured or tabulated values; lines represent fitted or interpolated functions used in our analysis.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：三个星系巡天所使用的星系数密度\(n_{{gal}}\)、星系偏差\(b^{G}(z)\)和放大偏差\(s^{G}(z)\)的值。标记表示测量值或表格值；线条表示我们分析中使用的拟合或插值函数。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Central redshifts used for each bin of the considered Surveys. The values are from: DES-like (Legnani et al. , 2026 ) , LSST-like (Collaboration et al. , 2021 ) , Euclid-like (Lepori et al. , 2022 ) . The bins for a MeerKLASS survey were chosen according to the z-range of the UHF band (Santos et al. , 2016 ) and the same was done for the SKAO survey with the same z-range as the MID Wide Band 1 (Bacon et al. , 2020 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：所考虑巡天每个分箱的中心红移。数值来自：类DES（Legnani et al., 2026）、类LSST（Collaboration et al., 2021）、类Euclid（Lepori et al., 2022）。MeerKLASS巡天的分箱根据UHF波段的红移范围（Santos et al., 2016）选择，SKAO巡天则采用与MID Wide Band 1相同的红移范围（Bacon et al., 2020）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Redshift bins considered for the DES-like, LSST-like and Euclid-like surveys. The values of the central redshifts of each bin are shown in Table 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：类DES、类LSST和类Euclid巡天所考虑的红移分箱。每个分箱的中心红移值见表2。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Redshift bins considered for the H i Surveys MeerKLASS and SKAO.The values of the central redshifts of each bin are shown in Table 2
figures.caption_zh: 图3：HI巡天MeerKLASS和SKAO所考虑的红移分箱。每个分箱的中心红移值见表2。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Values of the system temperatures, \(T_{{sys}}\) , used in the analysis that includes H i IM surveys.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：包含HI IM巡天的分析中使用的系统温度\(T_{{sys}}\)值。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Sky coverage for each survey. The sky fraction \(f_{{sky}}\) is computed relative to full sky ( \(4\pi\) [sr]). For multi-tracer combinations, we use the overlapping sky area, corresponding to the smaller \(f_{{sky}}\) of the two surveys. References: DES-like (Legnani et al. , 2026 ) , LSST-like (Collaboration et al. , 2021 ) , Euclid-like (Euclid Collaboration et al. , 2025 ) , MeerKLASS (Paul et al. , 2025 ) , SKAO (Bacon et al. , 2020 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表3：每个巡天的天区覆盖。天区比例\(f_{{sky}}\)相对于全天（\(4\pi\) [sr]）计算。对于多示踪组合，我们使用重叠天区，即两个巡天中较小的\(f_{{sky}}\)。参考文献：类DES（Legnani et al., 2026）、类LSST（Collaboration et al., 2021）、类Euclid（Euclid Collaboration et al., 2025）、MeerKLASS（Paul et al., 2025）、SKAO（Bacon et al., 2020）。

figures.caption_en: Table 4: Fiducial values of the analysed Cosmological parameters, see Planck Collaboration ( 2020 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表4：分析的宇宙学参数的基准值，参见Planck Collaboration (2020)。
